name: Notch_locus_chrX_3C7
description: Notch locus on chrX at cytological band 3C7. Single Notch gene in Drosophila — the ancestral copy from which vertebrate NOTCH1-4 paralogs diverged by two rounds of WGD. No drosophila Notch2/3/4. Useful negative control for paralog analysis: any read matching Notch in Drosophila MUST map uniquely (no within-organism paralogs).
